description: EcdsaP256Signer documents the expected wire format on its struct-level doc (line 172-174: '64 bytes of fixed-size r || s, not DER-encoded'). Ed25519Signer has no equivalent statement. The backend is required to return exactly 64 raw bytes in the Ed25519 compact format (RFC 8032 §5.1.6), not DER or any other encoding. Without this doc, implementers of SigningBackend (e.g. HSM adapters that return DER-encoded signatures) will get an opaque error from `ed25519::Signature::from_slice` at runtime. Fix: add a sentence to `Ed25519Signer`'s struct-level doc matching the existing P-256 format note.
title: Ed25519Signer missing byte-format contract in docs
